parameters.jsCode: const base = $('Normalize Input5').first().json; const r = $json.results?.[0] || {}; return [{ json: { ...base, latitude: r.latitude ?? null, longitude: r.longitude ?? null, city_resolved: r.name ?? base.city } }];

const base = $('Extract Coordinates2').first().json; const d = $json.daily || {}; const dates = d.time || []; const rain = d.precipitation_probability_max || []; const tmax = d.temperature_2m_max || []; const monthsAhead = Math.max(0, Math.floor(Number(base.months_ahead ?? 1))); const topN = Math.min(30, Math.max(1, Math.floor(Number(base.top_n_dates ?? 10)))); const includePrecip = String(base.include_precipitation || 'yes') === 'yes'; const minDate = new Date(); minDate.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0); minDate.setMonth(minDate.getMonth() + monthsAhead); const scored = dates.map((day, i) => { const r = Number(rain[i] ?? 50); const t = Number(tmax[i] ?? 25); let score = 100 - r; if (t < 16 || t > 33) score -= 15; return { date: day, precipitation_probability_max: r, temperature_2m_max: t, weather_score: Math.max(0, Math.min(100, score)) }; }).sort((a, b) => b.weather_score - a.weather_score); const filtered = scored.filter((row) => { const parsed = new Date(row.date); return !Number.isNaN(parsed.getTime()) && parsed >= minDate; }); let suggested = filtered.slice(0, topN); let weatherNotice = ''; if (suggested.length === 0) { suggested = scored.slice(0, topN); if (monthsAhead > 0) weatherNotice = 'Weather API daily forecast is short-term. Showing best available near-term dates; keep long-range planning from event_date_model and re-check weather closer to event.'; } if (!includePrecip) { suggested = suggested.map((row) => ({ date: row.date, weather_score: row.weather_score })); } return [{ json: { ...base, weather_context: scored.slice(0, 14), suggested_dates_weather: suggested, weather_notice: weatherNotice } }];

const base = $('Build Combined Candidates1').first().json; const limit = Math.min(15, Math.max(3, Number(base.top_n_dates ?? 10))); const lines = (base.combined_candidates || []).slice(0, limit).map((row, i) => `${i + 1}. ${row.date} | pluie=${row.precipitation_probability_max ?? '-'} | temp=${row.temperature_2m_max ?? '-'} | score=${row.weather_score ?? '-'} | source=${row.source}`).join('
'); const prompt = `Tu es un assistant IA de planification evenementielle pour Eventzella.

Contexte:
- Type d'evenement: ${base.event_type}
- Ville: ${base.city_resolved || base.city}
- Debut souhaite: ${base.months_ahead} mois
- Nombre de dates demande: ${base.top_n_dates}

Dates candidates (obligatoire: choisir seulement parmi cette liste):
${lines}

Consignes de recommandation:
- Prioriser weather_score eleve.
- Favoriser precipitation faible.
- Si source=weather+model, considerer prioritaire a score equivalent.
- Si horizon meteo court, rappeler la limite en une phrase.

Format de sortie (texte court et lisible):
1) Top 3 dates recommandees avec raison (1 ligne chacune)
2) 2 dates backup
3) Risque principal meteo
4) Conseil operationnel concret

Reponds en francais.`; return [{ json: { ...base, timeframe: `${base.months_ahead} mois`, top_n: Number(base.top_n_dates ?? 10), dates_list: lines, message: prompt, mode: 'domain', model: 'llama3:latest' } }];

const base = $('Build Combined Candidates1').first().json; let ai = $json || {}; if (!ai.reply && !ai.output && !ai.text && !ai.content) { try { ai = $('AI Agent3').first().json || ai; } catch (e) {} } if (!ai.reply && !ai.output && !ai.text && !ai.content) { try { ai = $('AI Disabled Fallback1').first().json || ai; } catch (e) {} } const aiText = String(ai.reply || ai.output || ai.text || ai.content || '').trim(); let aiParsed = null; try { const jsonMatch = aiText.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); if (jsonMatch) aiParsed = JSON.parse(jsonMatch[0]); } catch (e) { aiParsed = null; } if (!aiParsed) { const fallbackDates = (base.combined_candidates || []).slice(0, base.top_n_dates || 5); aiParsed = { best_dates: fallbackDates.map((d) => ({ date: d.date, score: d.weather_score ?? null, weather_summary: `Temp ${d.temperature_2m_max}°C, pluie ${d.precipitation_probability_max}%`, reason: 'Bonne condition meteo basee sur le score' })), top_recommended_date: { date: fallbackDates[0]?.date || null, explanation: 'Date avec le meilleur score meteo disponible' }, event_recommendations: ['Privilegier un evenement en exterieur si la meteo est stable', 'Prevoir un plan B en cas de changement meteo', 'Choisir un horaire en fin d\'apres-midi pour plus de confort'], raw_text: aiText }; } const bestDates = Array.isArray(aiParsed.best_dates) ? aiParsed.best_dates : []; const topDate = aiParsed.top_recommended_date || {}; const recos = Array.isArray(aiParsed.event_recommendations) ? aiParsed.event_recommendations : []; return [{ json: { success: true, event_type: base.event_type, city: base.city, city_resolved: base.city_resolved, weather_notice: base.weather_notice || '', combined_candidates: base.combined_candidates || [], ai_recommendation: aiParsed, best_dates: bestDates, top_recommended_date: topDate, event_recommendations: recos, raw_text: String(aiParsed.raw_text || aiText || '').trim(), recommended_dates: bestDates.map((d) => d.date).filter(Boolean), next_recommended_date: topDate.date || bestDates[0]?.date || null } }];
